title: Intriguing Umami Ethiopian Lentils Misir Wot
description: A light and festive Ethiopian dish featuring curry powder and tandoor spices, perfect for a vegetarian-friendly meal. This misir wot recipe is served in a lazy susan spinner vessel.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and ginger and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Stir in the curry powder and tandoor spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Add the lentils, water, and salt, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes, or until the lentils are tender.
Serve the misir wot hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Place the misir wot in a lazy susan spinner vessel for a festive presentation.
